---
title: 'BRSM Report 1 – Descriptive Statistics'
output:
  word_document:
    toc: true
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo    = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 8,
  fig.height = 5,
  dpi = 150
)
```

```{r packages}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(readr)
library(stringr)
library(moments)   # skewness(), kurtosis()
library(knitr)
library(kableExtra)
```

---

# Step 1: Load Data

```{r load-data}
path_lab_multi    <- "/home/akhila/Downloads/brsm pro/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/multiple/lab/"
path_lab_single   <- "/home/akhila/Downloads/brsm pro/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/single/lab/"
path_phone_multi  <- "/home/akhila/Downloads/brsm pro/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/multiple/phone/"
path_phone_single <- "/home/akhila/Downloads/brsm pro/Attention Task Validation/data_brsm/single/phone/"

load_lab <- function(folder_path, cond_label) {
  files <- list.files(folder_path, pattern = "*.csv", full.names = TRUE)
  lapply(files, function(f) {
    df  <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE)
    df  <- dplyr::mutate(df, across(everything(), as.character))
    pid <- str_extract(basename(f), "^[0-9]+")
    df$participant_id <- as.integer(pid)
    df$source    <- "lab"
    df$condition <- cond_label
    df
  }) |> bind_rows()
}

load_phone <- function(folder_path, cond_label) {
  files <- list.files(folder_path, pattern = "*.csv", full.names = TRUE)
  lapply(files, function(f) {
    df  <- read_csv(f, show_col_types = FALSE)
    df  <- dplyr::mutate(df, across(everything(), as.character))
    pid <- str_extract(basename(f), "^[0-9]+")
    df$participant_id <- as.integer(pid)
    df$source    <- "phone"
    df$condition <- cond_label
    df
  }) |> bind_rows()
}

lab_multi    <- load_lab(path_lab_multi,    "multiple")
lab_single   <- load_lab(path_lab_single,   "single")
phone_multi  <- load_phone(path_phone_multi,  "multiple")
phone_single <- load_phone(path_phone_single, "single")

cat("Rows loaded:\n")
cat("  lab_multi:",    nrow(lab_multi),   "\n")
cat("  lab_single:",   nrow(lab_single),  "\n")
cat("  phone_multi:",  nrow(phone_multi), "\n")
cat("  phone_single:", nrow(phone_single),"\n")
```

---

# Step 2: Clean Data

```{r clean-data}
# ---- Extract IRT from lab data ----
extract_irt_lab <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    filter(!is.na(`mouse.time`)) %>%
    mutate(
      irt_sec = as.numeric(str_extract(as.character(`mouse.time`), "[0-9]+\\.[0-9]+")),
      irt_ms  = irt_sec * 1000
    )
}

lab_multi_clean  <- extract_irt_lab(lab_multi)
lab_single_clean <- extract_irt_lab(lab_single)

# Ensure numeric
lab_multi_clean$irt_ms  <- as.numeric(lab_multi_clean$irt_ms)
lab_single_clean$irt_ms <- as.numeric(lab_single_clean$irt_ms)

# ---- Rename phone columns ----
rename_phone <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    rename(
      irt_ms       = `InitialResponseTime(ms)`,
      avg_inter_ms = `AvgInterTargetTime(ms)`,
      success_rate = `SuccessRate(%)`,
      hit_rate     = `HitRate(%)`,
      false_alarms = `FalseAlarms`,
      final_score  = `FinalScore`,
      completed    = `Completed`
    ) %>%
    mutate(across(c(irt_ms, false_alarms, hit_rate,
                    avg_inter_ms, final_score, Level), as.numeric))
}

phone_multi_clean  <- rename_phone(phone_multi)
phone_single_clean <- rename_phone(phone_single)

cat("Clean rows:\n")
cat("  lab_multi_clean:",   nrow(lab_multi_clean),   "\n")
cat("  lab_single_clean:",  nrow(lab_single_clean),  "\n")
cat("  phone_multi_clean:", nrow(phone_multi_clean), "\n")
cat("  phone_single_clean:",nrow(phone_single_clean),"\n")
```

---

# Step 3: Missing Value Summary

```{r missing-values}
missing_summary <- data.frame(
  Dataset      = c("Lab Multiple", "Lab Single", "Phone Multiple", "Phone Single"),
  Total_Rows   = c(nrow(lab_multi_clean), nrow(lab_single_clean),
                   nrow(phone_multi_clean), nrow(phone_single_clean)),
  Missing_IRT  = c(sum(is.na(lab_multi_clean$irt_ms)),
                   sum(is.na(lab_single_clean$irt_ms)),
                   sum(is.na(phone_multi_clean$irt_ms)),
                   sum(is.na(phone_single_clean$irt_ms)))
)

kable(missing_summary,
      caption = "Missing Value Summary for IRT across Datasets") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center")
```

---

# Step 4: Descriptive Statistics – IRT

```{r desc-irt}
describe_irt <- function(df, label) {
  vals <- as.numeric(df$irt_ms)
  vals <- vals[!is.na(vals)]
  data.frame(
    Group     = label,
    N         = length(vals),
    Mean_ms   = round(mean(vals),   1),
    Median_ms = round(median(vals), 1),
    SD_ms     = round(sd(vals),     1),
    Min_ms    = round(min(vals),    1),
    Max_ms    = round(max(vals),    1),
    IQR_ms    = round(IQR(vals),    1),
    Skewness  = round(skewness(vals), 3),
    Kurtosis  = round(kurtosis(vals), 3)
  )
}

desc_irt_table <- bind_rows(
  describe_irt(lab_single_clean,   "Lab – Single"),
  describe_irt(lab_multi_clean,    "Lab – Multiple"),
  describe_irt(phone_single_clean, "Phone – Single"),
  describe_irt(phone_multi_clean,  "Phone – Multiple")
)

kable(desc_irt_table,
      caption = "Table 1: Descriptive Statistics for Initial Response Time (ms)",
      col.names = c("Group","N","Mean","Median","SD","Min","Max","IQR","Skewness","Kurtosis")) %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width = TRUE, position = "center")

# Save for use in other Rmd files
saveRDS(list(
  lab_multi_clean   = lab_multi_clean,
  lab_single_clean  = lab_single_clean,
  phone_multi_clean = phone_multi_clean,
  phone_single_clean= phone_single_clean
), file = "cleaned_data.rds")

cat("\nCleaned data saved to cleaned_data.rds\n")
```

---

# Step 5: Descriptive Statistics – False Alarms (Phone)

```{r desc-fa}
# Build phone_combined from already-cleaned data (numeric columns guaranteed)
phone_combined <- bind_rows(
  phone_single_clean %>% mutate(Condition = "Single"),
  phone_multi_clean  %>% mutate(Condition = "Multiple")
)

# Safety cast — ensures numeric even if RDS loading changed types
phone_combined$false_alarms <- as.numeric(phone_combined$false_alarms)
phone_combined$hit_rate      <- as.numeric(phone_combined$hit_rate)
phone_combined$irt_ms        <- as.numeric(phone_combined$irt_ms)

desc_fa <- phone_combined %>%
  group_by(Condition) %>%
  summarise(
    N        = n(),
    Mean_FA  = round(mean(false_alarms,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_FA    = round(sd(false_alarms,     na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Median   = round(median(false_alarms, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Max_FA   = max(false_alarms, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups  = "drop"
  )

kable(desc_fa,
      caption = "Table 2: Descriptive Statistics for False Alarms (Phone Data)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center")
```

---

# Step 6: Descriptive Statistics – Hit Rate (Phone)

```{r desc-hitrate}
desc_hr <- phone_combined %>%
  group_by(Condition) %>%
  summarise(
    N          = n(),
    Mean_HR    = round(mean(hit_rate,   na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    SD_HR      = round(sd(hit_rate,     na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Median_HR  = round(median(hit_rate, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Min_HR     = round(min(hit_rate,    na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    Max_HR     = round(max(hit_rate,    na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    .groups    = "drop"
  )

kable(desc_hr,
      caption = "Table 3: Descriptive Statistics for Hit Rate (%) by Condition (Phone Data)") %>%
  kable_styling(bootstrap_options = c("striped","hover","condensed"),
                full_width = FALSE, position = "center")
```
